title: Tradebotengine.com
author: Adventurous_Chart360
selftext:
I am software engineer working in fintech and over the last 3 months I have built and iterated over my stock picker tool that I have been using for 3 months.

It's been a lot of checks and counter checks and finally I have been able to predict with reasonable success. Check out https://tradebotengine.com and sign up for daily updates. 

I have a screener that picks the most stable companies in US and run my analysis with 300 days of historical data and predict the list that will go up in the next 20 days. 

Check out the site and historical predictions..

Give me your feedback.

comments.author: Adventurous_Chart360
comments.body: looks like the site had a huge signup and the server went down. Having it restarted now.

replies.author: Nice-Combination-907
replies.body: Let me know when it’s back

comments.author: Mark-GC
comments.body: A fool and his money are easily parted.

comments.author: Jimq45
comments.body:
Looks good, but here is the question I ask all developers in this space….

If your tool can be used to make money— why are you creating competition?

replies.author: Adventurous_Chart360
replies.body: Intention is to make it better based on user feedback

replies.author: Jimq45
replies.body: Feedback? How can we give you feedback if it’s a black box. How are the picks generated? What’s the strategy? I’ll backrest it for you and give you feedback.

comments.author: Adventurous_Chart360
comments.body: Added performance page track performance of predictions
